issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for validation failures.

scenarios.name: Signup schema with nested address, password confirmation, and inferred TS type
scenarios.rationale: Yup is widely known so baseline gets common API right, but treatment is sharper on yup.ref('password') for confirmPassword, multi-.matches() password rules, and yup.InferType type inference.

scenarios.name: Conditional schema requiring email only when contactMethod='email', phone only when 'phone'
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gestures at .when but often uses the older object form; treatment uses the current then: (s) => s.email().required(...) callback pattern and validate(data, { abortEarly: false }) from the skill.
